_comment: FIXTURE (anchor, REQ-025): keyed v2.0 run whose dispatch-ledger.jsonl 'tag' was computed under a DIFFERENT key than the discovered sibling dispatch.key. Key presence is the downgrade authority, so a tag that does not verify under the run key is WITNESS_MISMATCH (exit 2 under strict) -- never a silent skip and never a false UNVERIFIABLE.
